verdict.answer_first: A states a usable plan immediately: "framework-agnostic plan to add rate limiting"; B delays with "just tell me... where the public API lives".
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to defaults like "token bucket... right default" and "both: coarse limit at the edge, fine-grained in-app"; B gives no recommendation.
verdict.fabrication: Both reference repo context not in the question: A says "this repo has no public API" and "/Users/elon/work/fable-profile"; B says "nothing in `fable-profile` receives inbound requests".
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it gives policy, placement, store, implementation, headers, observability, and tests; B only asks for more context.
